title: Implement transactional commit engine for approved import rows
acceptance_criteria: Commit action writes approved expense/income rows and conflict outcomes in one transaction
Rollback occurs when any write in the import commit fails
Manual transaction patterns remain compatible with existing actions
Targeted tests cover commit success and rollback behavior
deliverables: server action endpoint for final import confirmation
tests for transactional commit and rollback
completion_summary: Implemented transactional import commit engine + confirm action with decision persistence, idempotent confirmed-session guard, and tests for success and rollback semantics.
